capability.summary: Draft a BMAD capability pack for WebGL Fundamentals docs evidence through Context7.

acceptanceCriteria.statement: Forge emits deterministic Context7 WebGL Fundamentals Docs capability-pack draft artifacts from local evidence.
Generated capability request verifies offline without live Context7, MCP config, network, WebGL runtime, or browser GPU state access.
Generated artifacts preserve the /websites/webglfundamentals source mapping and the WebGL2 upstream caveat without declaring a separate WebGL2 Context7 capability.
